def eligible_for_stroke_prevention_program(self) -> bool:
        is_female = self.gender == "female"
        is_over_50 = self.age > 50
        is_not_asian = self.race != "asian"
        is_employed = self.employment_status == "employed"
        is_not_high_school_educated = self.education != "high school"
        is_married = self.marital_status == "married"
        is_religion_none = self.religion == "none"
        no_family_history_of_stroke = self.family_history_of_stroke == "no"

        if (
            is_female
            and is_over_50
            and is_not_asian
            and is_employed
            and is_not_high_school_educated
            and is_married
            and is_religion_none
            and no_family_history_of_stroke
        ):
            return True
        else:
            return False
